interpretability_note: Broad participation measure; includes non-tertiary schooling at the lower end of ages 18-24.
Closest match to university access, but still a proxy built from enrollment plus current education track.
Poor fit for ages 18-24 and `edu_complete` only appears in 2024-2025.
Observed consistently, but many ages 18-24 are still accumulating schooling so it is a noisy access outcome.
Stable broad attainment threshold, but wider than university expansion.
Broad proxy for post-secondary participation after upper secondary completion.
Requires co-resident parent linkage and is not mature for ages 18-24.
